heading: IP Access List
body:
Atlas only allows client connections to the cluster from entries in
the project's IP access list. To connect, you must add an entry to the
IP access list. To set up the IP access list for the project, see
Configure IP Access List Entries.

For Atlas clusters deployed on [Google Cloud Platform (GCP)](google-gcp) or
[Microsoft Azure](microsoft-azure), add the IP (Internet Protocol) addresses of your Google Cloud or
Azure (Microsoft Azure) services to Atlas project IP (Internet Protocol) access list to grant
those services access to the cluster.
